description:
You are assisting a cloud architect who is migrating a set of micro-services.  
A preliminary log of every external endpoint hit during the migration has been collected at the path

/home/user/migration/service_endpoints.log

Each line in that file is one fully-qualified host name (for example: “api-us.example.com”).  
Many endpoints appear more than once.

Your goal is to create a frequency report that shows how often each endpoint was contacted.

1. Read /home/user/migration/service_endpoints.log.  
2. Count how many times each unique endpoint appears.  
3. Produce a tab-separated report sorted primarily in descending numerical frequency and secondarily in lexicographical (ASCII) order of the endpoint when counts are equal.  
4. Save the report to

/home/user/migration/summary/endpoint_frequency.tsv

Exact output format (this is what the automated checker will look for):

• One line per endpoint.  
• Field 1: the endpoint (literal host name).  
• A single horizontal TAB character (0x09, not spaces).  
• Field 2: the decimal hit count.  
• No leading/trailing spaces.  
• Final line should end with a single UNIX newline “\n”.  
• Example line:  
  cdn.example.com<TAB>4

Constraints:  
• Solve the task using no more than a small pipeline of standard GNU coreutils (e.g., sort and uniq).  
• Create the directory /home/user/migration/summary if it does not yet exist.  
• Do not modify the original log file.  
• No sudo/root privileges are available.

When you finish, the only new artefact should be the file /home/user/migration/summary/endpoint_frequency.tsv with the exact content described above.
truth:
Initial state:

1. File /home/user/migration/service_endpoints.log already exists with these 12 lines (each ended by “\n”):
api-us.example.com
api-eu.example.com
api-us.example.com
api-us.example.com
auth.example.com
api-eu.example.com
cdn.example.com
auth.example.com
auth.example.com
cdn.example.com
cdn.example.com
cdn.example.com

2. Directory /home/user/migration/summary does NOT exist.

Expected artefact after successful completion:

File: /home/user/migration/summary/endpoint_frequency.tsv  
Permissions: default umask (0644).

Exact contents (4 lines, each terminated by “\n”, tab represented as ␉ below):

cdn.example.com␉4
api-us.example.com␉3
auth.example.com␉3
api-eu.example.com␉2
name: task_000000_6fe01691
